votes.rationale: Anthropic provider extension works correctly. Draft with --provider anthropic generated narrative via Anthropic API (claude-sonnet-4-6, status 200). OpenAI default path unchanged. Unknown provider rejected with clear error. Stdout correctly identifies which provider was used. All existing commands (context, draft, revise, evidence) now support --provider selection.

The implementation is minimal: provider-specific API functions are isolated, shared pipeline logic is not duplicated. OpenAI remains the default with no behavioral change when --provider is omitted. The Anthropic model string (claude-sonnet-4-6) was validated with a live API call during execution. All existing atomic write, scope guard, and non-invention boundaries are preserved.

Motion Factory v0 now supports both Phase 1 approved providers as operator-selected options. The extension does not change staffing canon, routing policy, or governance config. Provider choice is explicit and inspectable via stdout. The dual-provider philosophy of the Phase 1 staffing canon is now reflected in the factory.
